description_long: This is a modern, rectangular wooden cabinet with a rich, natural wood grain finish and a minimalist design. The front features three vertical panel doors with subtle grooves for opening, lacking any visible handles or hardware. The cabinet sits on a low, recessed base with two small, dark-colored support feet visible at the front. The sides and top are flat and smooth, continuing the wood grain pattern seamlessly. The back is plain, with no visible openings or features, indicating it is designed to be placed against a wall. This piece is likely used for storage in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways.
description: A modern, rectangular wooden cabinet with three panel doors and a seamless wood grain finish, supported by a low recessed base.
description_view_0: Front view showing three vertical panel doors with subtle grooves and two small support feet at the base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the flat, continuous wood grain surface and the cabinet's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, uninterrupted wood grain panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the flat wood grain surface and depth.
